# IR Program
# Generated by compiler-project

function test: int (x: int)
  entry:
      LOAD t1, [x]
      t2 = CMP_GT t1, 0
      JUMP_IF_NOT t2, L2
      JUMP L1
  L1:
      RETURN
      JUMP L3
  L2:
      LOAD t3, [x]
      t4 = CMP_LT t3, 0
      JUMP_IF_NOT t4, L5
      JUMP L4
  L4:
      t5 = NEG 1
      RETURN t5
      JUMP L6
  L5:
      RETURN
  L6:
  L3:

function main: int ()
  entry:
      t6 = CALL [test], 5
      RETURN t6
